# Chapter 13: Compressible flow, aerodynamics  (~110 pp)
- 13.1 Speed of sound (10) · 13.2 Mach number, regimes (10) · 13.3 Isentropic flow (12) · 13.4 Normal and oblique shocks (15) · 13.5 Nozzles, diffusers (12) · 13.6 Subsonic, transonic, supersonic, hypersonic aerodynamics (20) · 13.7 Heating in high-speed flow preview (10) · 13.8 Failure section: shock-induced failures, transonic-buzz wing failures (21)
